name: Becky Bond, Bernie 2016
subject: Bump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Bernie Supporters,
I wanted to make sure you saw today's email from Ben and Jerry about our important FEC fundraising deadline -- the most important yet of our campaign.
Your contribution before our deadline will go directly towards paying for the campaign staff who can train volunteers to knock on doors, make phone calls and spread the word about Bernie's message. **Voters in Iowa and New Hampshire will go to the polls and caucuses in just about four weeks and we are making great progress, so this is urgent.**
**[Make a $3 contribution to our campaign before the final, official FEC fundraising deadline of the year on Thursday night.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc942/1019029072/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151229pm-full")**
The average contribution from a supporter like you affords the campaign nearly two extra hours of work from a field organizer who can mobilize about ten volunteers at a single canvass or phone bank.
If we all chip in, there's no limit to what we can accomplish together. Please see Ben and Jerry's email below.
Becky Bond
Bernie 2016
* * *

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hi, Ben here. Ben Cohen
And Jerry. Jerry Greenfield |
| The people, not the corporation. Ben Cohen
We've known Bernie Sanders for 30 years. And for over 30 years, Bernie has been fighting for workers' rights, veterans, students, and senior citizens. Jerry Greenfield |
| If he weren't so inspiring, he'd be boring. Ben Cohen
As we travel the country campaigning for Bernie, we hear a lot of people saying, "I love Bernie, but I am not sure he can win." Jerry Greenfield |
| But poll after poll shows Bernie is the most electable Democrat. And that's because we all know in our hearts that the things Bernie is talking about are true. The system is rigged. Ben Cohen
In the end, this election is going to be about big money versus people power. Jerry Greenfield |
| So volunteer: knock on doors, make phone calls, talk to your friends. Ben Cohen
Wear your Bernie gear, put a bumper sticker on your car, and a sign on your lawn. But today, we have one more request. Jerry Greenfield |
| [**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign ahead of Thursday's important FEC fundraising deadline, the last one of the year.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc942/1019029072/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151229pm-full") Ben Cohen
In our view, too many candidates running for office now-a-days are financed by corporate interests. Jerry Greenfield |
| If you're a corporation, it's the best investment you can make. The return is extraordinary. Ben Cohen
Too many politicians sell out cheap. Jerry Greenfield |
| But not Bernie. His campaign is funded by over TWO MILLION individual contributions, averaging less than $30 each. That's something we should all be very proud of. Ben Cohen
I made a few of those contributions. Jerry Greenfield |
| And we've also spent a couple hundred dollars purchasing ice cream for campaign events. Ben Cohen
But with one month to go until people start voting, we need to ask one more time for our friend Bernie. Jerry Greenfield |
| [**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign ahead of Thursday's important FEC fundraising deadline, the last one of the year.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc942/1019029072/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151229pm-full") Ben Cohen
Every time Bernie ran for office in Vermont, people would say he didn't have a chance. Jerry Greenfield |
| But Bernie not only gets elected, he gets re-elected. Ben Cohen
And together, I know we're going to shock the political elite when we win in Iowa next month. Jerry Greenfield |
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc942/1019029072/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151229pm-full")
* * *
Thanks for joining us as part of this political revolution.
\- Ben Cohen & Jerry Greenfield -

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc943/1019029072/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc940/1019029072/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc941/1019029072/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28a8/43f17890/48fc4554/620dc94e/1019029072/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Doug Stafford
subject: This is shocking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

At this point in the race for the Republican
nomination for President, the most shocking thing would be if
nothing shocking happens.

That's the central message of the brand new
New York Times article that pores over past presidential race
results compared to polls with one month to go.

As the author states:

"This phase of the race -- the final stretch
before Iowa and New Hampshire -- can be the most volatile of the
campaign, as early-state voters make up their minds, politicians
and newspapers make endorsements, and candidates make strategic
decisions to invest time and money in particular states."

Patriot, it's not often I agree with the New
York Times. But facts are facts.

At this point in 2008, John McCain's campaign
was left for dead. In 2012, Rick Santorum was little more than an
afterthought.

In 2016, with your help, I believe it will be
Rand Paul who surges to the top.

But this end-of-year moneybomb will be key to
helping us create a tidal wave of momentum in January.

But the December 31st deadline is quickly
approaching. I need your help now.

With 800 precinct captains in Iowa, a
campaign presence in all 99 counties, and volunteers burning up
phone lines and knocking on doors, we have laid an incredibly
strong grassroots foundation to build on.

That's true for ALL the early voting states.

But this is the stretch run.

On January 12, the Senate votes on Rand's
Audit the Fed bill. There will be two more presidential debates
in January. Then on February 1, the voting begins.

Our goal is to ensure Rand Paul's unwavering
message of Liberty is front and center during this last critical
month.

That means a nonstop campaign schedule. It

body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Hey Friend -- I had to share this with you. I woke up at 5:22 AM
to a message from Hillary.

Hey Friend --
I had to share this with you.

I woke up at 5:22 AM to a message from Hillary.

She sent an email to all her supporters rallying them to raise
money to stop a "Cruz presidency."

Hillary is panicking about a "Cruz presidency" because it doesn't
line up with the agenda she has for "families" and "the country,"
but she won't even say what she believes in...

She is just pleading with her supporters to rally against my
campaign and send her money.

Friend, I think it's important that you know what I stand for
and what I stand against.
So, let me share with you (and Hillary) what a "Cruz presidency"
will NOT be:

>>
A continuation of the soft Obama-Clinton foreign policy of
weakness and refusing to name and fight radical Islam: I will
destroy ISIS and al-Qaeda.

>>
A continuation of the Obama-Clinton policy of amnesty and
open borders -- leaving America less safe and less secure: I
will secure our borders and keep Americans safe.

>>
A continuation of the Obama-Clinton policy of fewer jobs,
high taxes and more government regulations: I will create good
high paying jobs, lower taxes, and eliminate wasteful government.

>>
A continuation of the Obama-Clinton policy of taking away
personal freedoms and replacing them with a bigger, more
intrusive centralized government: I will protect the Constitution
and defend the 2nd Amendment.

Friend, I can only defeat the Obama-Clinton machine -- and
ensure an end to their disastrous policies -- with your immediate
help.

As you know, in less than 36 hours, I have the most important
deadline of this campaign.

I asked my staff to check, and as of today, it looks like you
haven't been able to stand with me financially. Is there any way
you can contribute even $5 before the end of 2015?
Hillary has an army of committed, rich liberal donors all set to
raise her hundreds of millions of dollars in this fight.

But Friend, I know that you and the rest of my supporters are
just as committed.

Will you contribute just $5 -- or $35 or $50 if you can afford
it -- to ensure I can meet my 2015 goal?

I have less than 36 hours to make this happen.

Hillary's supporters are digging deep in their contributions to
defeat me even as I write this email to you.

If you can contribute to my campaign today, Hillary will hate
it.
BUT Heidi and I will be forever grateful.

For liberty,
Ted Cruz

name: Doug Stafford
subject: URGENT: Campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

While Rand spends his holiday break
performing charitable surgeries back in Kentucky, I wanted to
take a few minutes to update you on the campaign.

Thursday marks the end of the financial
quarter. We need a big boost to reach our fourth quarter goal
before December 31st.

We've set a goal of raising $500,000 with our
end-of-year moneybomb to help us hit the ground running in 2016
-- but we're $300,000 away. With only 2 days left of this year!

We need your help today, Patriot.

We're only 30 days away from the first
deciding contests in Iowa and New Hampshire. That makes the
December 31st fundraising deadline crucial to our success.

The next leg of this race will be an all-out
sprint, and you can bet we're going all of the way. We're
prepared and ready to fight it out every day.

And with good reason. We are in far better
shape than the mainstream media and armchair quarterbacks would
allow you to believe.

In yesterday's CBS poll, Rand is polling in
5th place, one point shy of 4th place, and ahead of Bush, Kasich,
Christie, and Fiorina. He has recently been in 5th or 6th in
multiple national and state polls.

And more importantly, we've set up an
excellent ground game plan in Iowa and New Hampshire and with
your help we'll have the ability to keep it running and be in a
position to win both next month. This is our final push for an
excellent showing in both states.

The first part of that plan begins NOW. We
need to raise an additional $300,000 in the next 2 days.

WE CAN DO IT.

Both of the last two quarters have seen
similar goals set and exceeded.

NEXT comes Rand hitting the ground hard after
the holidays. January 3rd sets off a seven-day swing through NH
and Iowa. There will be events large and small, swaths of media,
and a stop in NYC in between for Rand to talk about his positive
message on national television.

This week is crucial to our pre-debate
messaging and through the first voting contests. It's vital we
have a strong week of events, media coverage, and voter outreach.

We are counting on every supporter now more
than ever.

You can help us elevate Rand and his message
so that voters can see what a real champion of liberty looks
like.

Rand will be fighting every day to show the
voters why he should be the next President.

We have 2 days left to help him.

Let's make sure we have his back at this most
crucial time.

Please donate now to our end-of-year
moneybomb.

In liberty,
Doug Stafford
Chief Political Strategist

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

| We have a chance, Friends.

**The _National Journal_ ranked Marco Rubio's Senate seat fourth as one of the most likely to flip parties in 2016.**

That means we have a chance to grab it, but this race is competitive. We cannot afford to miss one fundraising goal and we have our last end-of-quarter goal in **24 hours.**

**This is our most important goal of the year -- and, right now -- we 're behind. **We've started a matching program for our most active supporters.

_**Good news -- you 've qualified for our matching program. But this offer won't last for long. If you give before midnight on the 31st, your gift will be doubled and so will your impact.**_ [**Can you give $5 or more before 12/31? Your gift will be matched.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21a5/738133e4/3bbe940d/7f839dbd/1725575100/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151230?refcode=pme151230_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00") I know the holidays aren't over, and this is probably still a busy time for you. But we've already had a glimpse of what conservative special interest groups are plotting for next year, and it isn't pretty.

Before the _National Journal_ list even came out, a SuperPAC decided to attack me with a video distorting my record and cheaply attempting to play upon Americans' fear of terrorism.

body:
Dear Patriot: There are only a little over 24 hours left until the clocks strikes midnight on the east coast and Americans ring in 2016. **I want this coming year to go down in history as the year that Americans took our country back . . .** Back from the big spenders in BOTH parties that have saddled our nation with $18.8 TRILLION in debt. Back from the Federal Reserve bankers who wield enormous amounts of power over our economy in near-total secret. Back from the bureaucrats-know-best crowd who believes they can run our lives better than we can. [**But Patriot, I'm counting on you to help us reach my campaign's $500,000 fundraising goal for this end-of-year moneybomb**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592756:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r). [If you haven't yet given, will you please agree to a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 right away?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592756:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r) Or, if you already have contributed, would you consider [chipping in just $5](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592757:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r) more -- and then forwarding this email to at least five of your family and friends? | | [$25 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592756:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
---
[$50 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592758:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
[$75 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592759:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
[$100 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592760:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592761:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
**With only one month left until voting begins, this is THE most critical fundraising deadline my campaign has faced yet.**
Thanks to your support, we've built a strong foundation in ALL the early states.
But this is crunch time.
**This is when we must do whatever we can to ensure my message of liberty is front and center in every voters' mind during this critical month.**
[Will you agree to $500, $250 or $100 to help my campaign plaster the TV and radio airwaves in Iowa and New Hampshire?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592762:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
If that's too much, [could agree to $50, $25 or even $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592756:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r) to help my campaign run Internet ads, ramp up our volunteer phone banks and flood Iowa and New Hampshire mailboxes with last-minute mail?
Patriot, I'm counting on you.
[Please act at once.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32592756:WGUYZPyON:m:1:879035888:42D5665584316E53E3C2870B9CE4BD49:r)
In liberty,
Rand Paul

Friend -- I'm literally running out of time.

If you haven't read my email below...**please do so before midnight tonight.**

If you've already read this, forgive me...our emails must have crossed in cyberspace.

Tomorrow is the last day of the year, and the last day my campaign can take contributions for 2015.

You see: while Hillary has scores of liberal donors coming to her aid -- I'm still well behind my end of year goal.

-Ted

| Hey Friend -- I had to share this with you.

I woke up at 5:22 AM to a message from Hillary.

She sent an email to all her supporters rallying them to raise money to stop a "Cruz presidency."

Hillary is panicking about a "Cruz presidency" because it doesn't line up with the agenda she has for "families" and "the country,"**but she won't even say what she believes in**...

She is just pleading with her supporters to rally against my campaign and send her money.

**Friend, I think it's important that you know what I stand for and what I stand against.**

So, let me share with you (and Hillary) what a "Cruz presidency" will NOT be:

| >> | **A continuation of the soft Obama-Clinton foreign policy of weakness and refusing to name and fight radical Islam:** I will destroy ISIS and al-Qaeda.

---|---
>> | **A continuation of the Obama-Clinton policy of amnesty and open borders -- leaving America less safe and less secure:** I will secure our borders and keep Americans safe.

>> | **A continuation of the Obama-Clinton policy of fewer jobs, high taxes and more government regulations:** I will create good high paying jobs, lower taxes, and eliminate wasteful government.

>> | **A continuation of the Obama-Clinton policy of taking away personal freedoms and replacing them with a bigger, more intrusive centralized government:** I will protect the Constitution and defend the 2nd Amendment.

Friend, I can only defeat the Obama-Clinton machine -- and ensure an end to their disastrous policies -- with your immediate help.

As you know, in less than 36 hours, I have the most important deadline of this campaign.

[**I must ask again -- is there any way you can contribute $35, $50 or even $100 in the next 36 hours?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32593047:WhgH9PyLN:m:1:1104269936:1D26037F27493492C116355B5ADD4DB6:r)

Hillary has an army of committed, rich liberal donors set to raise her hundreds of millions of dollars in this fight.

But Friend, I know that you and the rest of my supporters are just as committed.

[**Will you contribute one more time in the next 36 hours -- $35, $50 or even $100 if you can afford it -- to ensure I can meet my 2015 goal?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32593047:WhgH9PyLN:m:1:1104269936:1D26037F27493492C116355B5ADD4DB6:r)

_I have only hours left before the books close on 2105._

Hillary's supporters are digging deep in their contributions to defeat me even as I write this email to you.

**[If you can contribute to my campaign today, Hillary will hate it.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32593047:WhgH9PyLN:m:1:1104269936:1D26037F27493492C116355B5ADD4DB6:r)**

BUT Heidi and I will be forever grateful.

For liberty,
Ted Cruz

Sent from my iPhone

name: Marco Rubio
subject: What a year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45615674:6JZV08rmN:m:1:1349778030:9E6180DADF1338086F9707A15F7D5746:r)
---
| Peter -- What a year it's been - as 2015 ends, our campaign's momentum is growing even faster than I ever expected. From the packed grassroots events we've hosted in the four early states to the engagement we're seeing from voters all across the country in response to the conservative ideas I've laid out at the debates, Americans are catching on to the idea of a New American Century. So now, I want to talk to you about where we're going, and what I envision for the new year. It's always good to start with the end in mind, so let me remind you of what we're working for: Come November 2016, America needs to elect a conservative, optimistic leader who's ready for the 21st Century, and that's exactly what we're going to do.
Things are going to start happening pretty fast over the next few weeks: I'm going to be in Iowa and New Hampshire a lot -- we've even got a bus for the job, affectionately dubbed the Marcomobile.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45615675:6JZV08rmN:m:1:1349778030:9E6180DADF1338086F9707A15F7D5746:r)
---
| I'll be in South Carolina this month, too, and Nevada soon enough. We're feeling really good about all the early states: Our organizers on the ground are grinding out the hard work of voter contact and persuasion, and the results we've seen have been incredible: tens of thousands of committed Iowa caucus goers, great numbers in New Hampshire, and more. But that's all going to be behind us in **just over a month.** I want to lay out a vision for what's going to follow. First, we're already well into organizing for the later primary states, all over America -- my team is seeing lots of momentum there, too. Our vision appeals to all Americans -- young and old, college-educated, blue-collar, everyone. That kind of broad support is exactly what's going to serve us well in primaries across the country. But the even more exciting part is going to be what comes after that: when we finally get to take on Hillary Clinton. Let's be clear: It's not going to be easy, because Hillary and Bill Clinton have spent the last two decades building a gigantic rolodex of corporate connections, political favors, and big-time donors. But I'm confident that we have the message and the vision that can beat Hillary. You're already hearing about it on the campaign trail -- my focus on 21st Century ideas, on making sure our policies reflect our values and keep up with the transformations we've seen in our economy. Hillary's ideas are stuck in the past and out of touch with ordinary Americans, and voters like you know it. They're hungering for fresh new ideas, and the only way forward to a New American Century is through American solutions -- relying on the people, the private sector, local communities, to power prosperity and innovation. Our campaign is already set up to answer this need -- I've put out detailed policy plans on everything from health care to taxes, entitlements, energy, and regulation. We're ahead of any other Republican in the field in this regard. And that matters, we need big ideas, because Hillary is going to be making some big promises. But they're false promises -- the failed record of President Obama shows what liberalism has to offer America. We're going to get rising wages, stronger families, better health care, quality schools, and a safer America not by going back to the past, but by moving forward. The campaign trail is intense, but I can't wait for the next ten months. I'm running for president because we need to be the party of the future, not the past -- and this year, we're going to make that crystal clear. With it, we're going to win the White House. I hope you're as excited as I am for this year. Even with all the momentum building behind us, we won't make it far at all without [**the help**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45615675:6JZV08rmN:m:1:1349778030:9E6180DADF1338086F9707A15F7D5746:r) of people like you. It's going to be a great year - I hope to have **[your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45615675:6JZV08rmN:m:1:1349778030:9E6180DADF1338086F9707A15F7D5746:r)** all the way until we take back the White House. Happy New Year, Marco Rubio P.S. As the campaign gets even more competitive, I'm going to need all the support I can get - [**go here to pitch in to build our momentum for 2016.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45615675:6JZV08rmN:m:1:1349778030:9E6180DADF1338086F9707A15F7D5746:r)
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45615676:6JZV08rmN:m:1:1349778030:9E6180DADF1338086F9707A15F7D5746:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: My New Year's Resolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

I hope you noticed that the last two messages I sent you tried to avoid some of the over-the-top rhetoric that so often accompanies emails that solicit campaign funds. I don't like many of the emails I receive from other candidates that are full of the canned rhetoric that some campaigns seem to love. And I want to make sure we don't slip into that trap.

So my early New Year's resolution is to try to make sure the emails we send you address real issues and explain clearly the reasons I am taking certain actions and making certain requests.

Unfortunately, that does not mean that you won't be receiving urgent requests for financial help.

The truth is that until we enact campaign finance reform -- which I have been fighting hard to achieve -- you and other grassroots supporters are our best defense against outside SuperPacs. It is your involvement and financial support that keep us moving forward.

**[We are now facing a very important end-of-year FEC deadline and your support is badly needed. Click here if you can help today.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c09/70cdc2ba/47baeed1/396476d/947165452/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em123015&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+are+now+facing+a+very+important+endof&utm_campaign=em123115&source=em123115")**

The reality is that as a statewide Senate campaign, we have a huge need for resources to help us get our message out. That is especially true now because -- at this very moment -- we are facing an outside SuperPac that is spending $1 million in the Baltimore media market to defeat us. They saw the independent Baltimore Sun poll that showed our 14-point lead, and are spending $1 million to try to change that.

[**Your help right now can make a big difference and help prevent this out-of-state SuperPac from reversing our momentum. Can you contribute now and help us fight back?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c09/70cdc2ba/47baeed1/396476a/947165452/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em123015&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Your+help+right+now+can+make+a+big+diffe&utm_campaign=em123115&source=em123115")

Until we fix our campaign finance laws -- which I have been working tirelessly to do -- I need your financial help to succeed.

Thank you for helping out before the end-of-year deadline by contributing whatever you can.

Best,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c09/70cdc2ba/47baeed1/396476b/947165452/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em123115&source=em123115") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

body:
| **" Senate Races to Watch": FLORIDA**
\-- _Roll Call_ , 12/29/2015 Friends -- we're not kidding when we say these FEC deadlines are important.

The press, special interest groups, and our opponents are watching closely. Everyone knows that whoever replaces Marco Rubio could very well determine who controls the Senate.

[**We can 't afford to miss our $40,000 FEC goal, but we're still $10,983 short and time is running out. If you donate $5 or more right now, your donation will be DOUBLED with a matching gift.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21a2/738133e4/3bb2c9f6/7f839ed2/1051495380/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151230pm?refcode=pme151230pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Groups backed by Karl Rove and the Koch brothers have already come after me, and we're not even to 2016. A SuperPAC launched an ad that completely distorts my record. We're counting on you all to help us raise the money we'll need to fight back.

Right-wing groups are watching our fourth quarter FEC numbers, too. If we show weakness by missing our goal, they'll pounce on that opportunity.

We need to show them that we're not backing down. **We need to let everyone know that we will not allow Florida 's Senate seat to be bought by special interests.**

[**We do all that by hitting every goal we set. "Almost" isn't good enough -- in the next 24 hours, we need to reach our $40,000 FEC goal. Give right now and have your contribution matched.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21a2/738133e4/3bb2c9f6/7f839ed2/1051495380/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151230pm?refcode=pme151230pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Together, we can win this race. But I can't do it without you friends.

Let's knock this goal out of the park.

Team Murphy

name: Cody Brown, Senior Advisor
subject: Friend, did you hear what Rush said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

**The GOP “sold the country down the river”.**

This is how Rush Limbaugh described the GOP’s recent budget deal with the Democrats — a deal that funds Planned Parenthood even after we learned they harvest and sell baby parts...yes, baby parts.

**You know who won’t sell the country down the river? Rick Santorum.**

[Will you donate $25 to help defeat the GOP establishment?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum2016%3Fsc%3D20151230&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cody_final&n=1)

The GOP establishment wants us to stop talking about moral issues like life, family, and Biblical values. They think we should just focus on jobs, deficit reduction, and limiting the size of government.

Yet they can't explain how we can limit government without a moral code that binds us and constrains the passions of men. They have no answer for John Adams who said, “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious people. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.”

These moral issues are the basis for our Constitution and our American way of life. To stop fighting for these issues is to compromise the very unalienable rights endowed by our Creator that led our founders to revolution.
On these, we do not need a compromise, what we need is a warrior.

[Will you donate $25 to help elect a conservative warrior?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum2016%3Fsc%3D20151230&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cody_final&n=2)

There is one candidate in this race whose character is beyond reproach, whose achievements for our movement are many, and who can be trusted to lead us into battle and win.

* Rick ended partial birth abortions in America.
* Rick forced the only vote on a constitutional amendment to define marriage as one man, one woman.
* Rick has ended a federal entitlement program.
* Rick is the only candidate that ISIS has named as a personal enemy. Why? Because Rick has exposed them for who they are — radical Islamic terrorists — and authored the sanctions that were placed on Iran and Syria. Rick is the most qualified candidate to be commander-in-chief.

Rick hasn’t just fought our battles, he’s fought and won. This is why Rick is vilified by the GOP establishment, the radical left, and ISIS. As it’s been said, a man is known by his enemies.

This is why Rush Limbaugh has said that, “If Rick Santorum were elected president, I wouldn't have one doubt any day what he would be fighting for, not one.”

[With 31 days to go before the Iowa caucuses, will you donate $25 to help elect Rick Santorum?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum2016%3Fsc%3D20151230&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cody_final&n=3)

With kind regards,

Cody Brown
Senior Advisor
Rick Santorum for President

subject: It might not be enough

body:

Right now, Katie is doing everything she can to run the kind of campaign that can take on the big money Republican machine and win this election for a seat in the U.S. Senate. **But this time, Katie 's hard work alone might not be enough.** [**Katie needs to raise $10,000 in online contributions by midnight tomorrow if she 's going to beat Pat Toomey and win this election, but she needs your support. Can you help her reach her BIGGEST goal of the year by chipping in $5 before the FEC deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8664865317295489024/1872392435800211456?refcode=e20151230.4&refcode2=e20151230.4nd&amount=5) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8664865317295489024/1872392435800211456?refcode=e20151230.4&refcode2=e20151230.4nd&amount=5)

\- Colleen Maguire
